tasks.description: Audit any new variable expansions in neos-installer-partition.sh for log injection.
Ensure execution paths remain strictly defined.
Audit systemd sandboxing on neos-autoupdate.service. Ensure ProtectSystem=strict is avoided as it breaks updates.
Validate that external product URLs load in a secure sandbox context if clicked.
Audit the implementation of option termination to confirm complete mitigation of option injection vulnerabilities in administrative scripts.
Verify that the early exit upon missing snapper does not bypass the flock-based locking mechanisms or introduce TOCTOU race conditions.
Review the modifications to README.md to ensure no arbitrary external links are introduced.
Sanitize TARGET_DEV variable in neos-installer-partition.sh to prevent injection.
Add strict PATH export and sanitize variables in neos-liveuser-setup to prevent path hijacking and log injection
Confirm checklist updates do not alter external links or instructions.
Validate that the new security scanning correctly identifies vulnerabilities and operates securely.
